questionHtml: Suggest a reason for high total serum cholesterol not always being an indicator of CHD risk.
markschemeHtml:
1. depends on the type of cholesterol/ratio of HDL to LDL/some types of cholesterol do not increase the chance of CHD;
  2. may not indicate CHD if lack other risk factors for CHD;

meta.title: Suggest a reason for high total serum cholesterol not always being an indicator of CHD risk.
